name: Refactor
description: Analyze codebase architecture, plan incremental refactoring steps, execute changes, and validate with tests and build.

config.prompt: Analyze codebase architecture. Identify code smells, duplication, and areas for improvement.
Create a step-by-step refactoring plan. Each step should be independently deployable.
Execute the refactoring plan. Preserve all existing behavior. Run tests after each change.
